lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: What? Can't you see I'm busy?

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: I have received word from my father of your assistance to our family in this matter. You have my thanks for restoring our honour.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: Yes well... Is there anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you change my gauntlets for me?

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: Yes certainly, though it will cost you 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: I have received word from my father that you assisted us again! I get the feeling you weren't going to stop trying until you did though.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: As a token of my appreciation, I will happily forge you as many pairs of Goldsmith gauntlets as you desire.

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: You will find the rate you gain experience when smelting gold much improved whilst wearing these gauntlets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have some more goldsmith gauntlets, please?

lines.speaker: Avan
lines.text: You will find the rate you gain experience when smelting gold much improved whilst wearing these gauntlets.
